warheads.name: RS-24 Yars RV
warheads.description: Warhead for RS-24 Yars ICBM. Estimated 100-150 kt per RV. MIRV capable (3 warheads).

warheads.name: RS-28 Sarmat RV
warheads.description: Warhead for RS-28 Sarmat. Estimated 500-800 kt per RV. Can carry 10-16 MIRVs or HGVs.

warheads.name: R-36M2 Voevoda RV
warheads.description: Warhead for SS-18 Satan/Voevoda. 800 kt per RV, 10 MIRVs per missile. Cold War legacy system.

warheads.name: RSM-56 Bulava RV
warheads.description: Warhead for Bulava SLBM. Estimated 100-150 kt per RV. 6 warheads per missile.

warheads.name: RSM-54 Sineva RV
warheads.description: Warhead for Sineva SLBM. 4 RVs per missile at 100 kt each. Delta IV submarine.

warheads.name: Avangard HGV warhead
warheads.description: Hypersonic glide vehicle warhead. 2 Mt claimed yield. Deployed on RS-28 and modified UR-100N.

warheads.name: 9N523 Iskander Nuclear
warheads.description: Nuclear warhead for 9M723 Iskander-M SRBM. Estimated 5-50 kt. Tactical theater weapon.

warheads.name: RN-40 Gravity Bomb
warheads.description: Strategic gravity bomb for Tu-160/Tu-95 bombers. Estimated 500 kt yield.

warheads.name: Kinzhal Nuclear Warhead
warheads.description: Nuclear-capable warhead for Kh-47M2 Kinzhal air-launched hypersonic missile. Est. 10-50 kt.

delivery_systems.name: RS-24 Yars (silo)
delivery_systems.description: Russia's primary silo-based ICBM. 3 MIRV warheads at 150 kt each. Replacing SS-19/SS-18.

delivery_systems.name: RS-24 Yars (mobile TEL)
delivery_systems.description: Road-mobile Yars on MZKT-79221 TEL. Survivability through mobility. 78 launchers operational.

delivery_systems.name: RS-28 Sarmat (SS-X-30)
delivery_systems.description: Heavy ICBM replacing Voevoda. 200-ton throw weight. Depressed trajectory capable. Initial IOC 2022.

delivery_systems.name: R-36M2 Voevoda (SS-18 Satan)
delivery_systems.description: Cold War-era heavy ICBM. 10 MIRVs at 800 kt each. Being replaced by RS-28 Sarmat.

delivery_systems.name: RSM-56 Bulava (SS-N-32)
delivery_systems.description: SLBM for Borei-class SSBN. 4 Borei boats with 16 tubes each = 64 missiles. Troubled development.

delivery_systems.name: RSM-54 Sineva (SS-N-23)
delivery_systems.description: SLBM for Delta IV submarines. 7 boats × 16 tubes = 112 missiles. Long-range liquid-fuel SLBM.

delivery_systems.name: Avangard Hypersonic Glide Vehicle
delivery_systems.description: HGV on UR-100N/RS-28 platform. Maneuvering hypersonic re-entry. Claimed to defeat all ABM systems.

delivery_systems.name: 9M723 Iskander-M
delivery_systems.description: Dual-capable SRBM. Nuclear and conventional variants. Deployed across Russia, including Kaliningrad.

delivery_systems.name: Tu-160 Blackjack
delivery_systems.description: Supersonic strategic bomber. Carries 12 Kh-55SM ALCM or 12 Kh-102 cruise missiles. 16 operational.

delivery_systems.name: Tu-95MS Bear-H
delivery_systems.description: Turboprop strategic bomber. Carries 6-16 Kh-55 ALCM externally/internally. 58 nuclear-capable.

delivery_systems.name: Kh-47M2 Kinzhal
delivery_systems.description: Air-launched hypersonic aeroballistic missile on MiG-31K. Mach 10+. Claimed nuclear capability.
